sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Inventory/Weight System
special_mechanics.description: Game features an inventory system with weapon weight mechanics affecting character movement and capability

physics_values.note: Various weapons have weight values (Knife: 2, Sword: 4, Short Sword: 4, Steel Sword: 8, Claymore: 10) but impact on physics not documented

special_mechanics.name: Dueling System
special_mechanics.description: Game includes melee duel mechanics with various opponents throughout

physics_values.note: Attack values documented for weapons but movement physics during duels not specified

tier_notes: Tier 3: No quantitative physics parameters documented. Source material contains game design, debug information, and development artifacts but no movement physics specifications. Game is action/adventure platformer hybrid with Zelda-like mechanics, but specific movement feel parameters are not documented in available sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves (NES)
